Rome.note: Trajan's Column: every founded city starts with a free monument

Egypt.note: Iteru: +15% production toward wonders in cities on a river

Greece.note: Plato's Republic: +1 wildcard policy slot; Surrounded by Glory: +5% culture per suzerained city-state

China.note: Dynastic Cycle: eurekas and inspirations give 50% (vs 40%); First Emperor: builders get +1 charge

Sumeria.note: Epic Quest: clearing a barbarian camp also grants a tribal village reward

Aztec.note: Gifts for the Tlatoani: +1 combat strength per distinct improved luxury

Scythia.note: Killer of Cyrus: units heal 30 HP after killing a unit
